benefits: Ignores difficult terrain created by ice or snow.
Tolerates temperatures as low as -50 degrees Fahrenheit without additional protection.
If wearing heavy clothes, tolerates temperatures as low as -100 degrees Fahrenheit.
mechanics.notes: The temperature tolerances are very specific and provide clear mechanical value regarding environmental hazards, complementing the cold resistance.
